HERO.TITLE: Yago Catalano Andújar
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Full-stack developer specialising in Angular and Spring Boot. Passionate about building interfaces where back-end logic and great user experience coexist seamlessly.

ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.ABOUT_TEXT: I am a full-stack web developer with a degree in Web Application Development and a strong leaning towards interface design. I am passionate about building digital products where back-end logic and user experience coexist without friction.
ABOUT.ADDITIONAL: Fast learner, naturally curious and determined to take projects from idea to deployment. I have worked both in team environments and completely independently — from concept in Figma through to server deployment.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Open to new opportunities — freelance, internships or full-time roles. Tell me how I can help.

VITALY.DESCRIPTION: As part of the development team: maintenance and implementation of back-end logic improvements and responsive front-end updates. Developed and deployed a complete CRM from scratch, documented the API with Swagger, and implemented persistent database improvements using PostgreSQL with JPQL query optimisation.

VKS.DESCRIPTION: End-to-end development of a website for an esports team from Extremadura. Full visual system design in Figma, solo development with Angular 20, server deployment setup, and a secondary page for AEXVES built with WIX. Responsible for all UX strategy and interactive experience decisions.

WORK.TITLE: Projects
WORK.DESCRIPTION: A selection of projects I have built — from production apps to personal experiments.

SUBTITLER.TITLE: Subtitler: Live
SUBTITLER.DESCRIPTION: Web app that captures screen audio in real time and transcribes it using Amazon Transcribe. Final-year project built with JavaScript.

WISHLIST.TITLE: Wishlist
WISHLIST.DESCRIPTION: Responsive wishlist with filters built with Angular and Bootstrap.

MAZAOGYM.TITLE: MazaoGym
MAZAOGYM.DESCRIPTION: Gym management project built for a first-year DAW course using PHP.

DUNGEON.TITLE: Dungeon in Java
DUNGEON.DESCRIPTION: Dungeon game built in Java with JavaFX. End-of-year programming project.

PORTFOLIO.TITLE: CatanduYago.github.io
PORTFOLIO.DESCRIPTION: My GitHub Pages repository where I deploy most of my projects and apps.

VKS.TITLE: Valkiria's Vikings
VKS.DESCRIPTION: Website fully designed and developed by me for the Extremadura esports team. Figma design + Angular 20. Pending publication.

SKILLS.TITLE: Skills
SKILLS.DESCRIPTION: Technologies I work with regularly — across front-end, back-end and databases.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: Testimonials
TESTIMONIALS.DESCRIPTION: People who have worked or studied with me.

BORJA.TEXT: An exceptional teammate with real talent for web development. Always attentive and with an incredible ability to grasp even the most complex concepts. His skill at solving technical problems is impressive, and his dedication makes him a key asset in any team. Smart, proactive, and with a positive attitude. Highly recommended!
